name: Chocolate Chip Cream Cheese Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Let one roll soften at room temperature.
2. Spread the softened cookie dough in the bottom of a 9" x 13" baking pan.
3. Do not grease or flour the pan.
4. With a mixer, mix cream cheese, sugar, eggs, and vanilla until fluffy.
5. Spread the cream cheese mixture on top of the cookie dough.
6. Slice the remaining roll of cookie dough on top of the cream cheese.
7. Bake for 35 minutes at 350 degrees.
8. Cool completely before cutting.
Note: You can also use brownie cookie dough or any store-bought rolled cookie dough.
